name: First Baptist Church Family Life Center
description: First Baptist Church Family Life Center is a place to play pickleball in Bartlesville, OK. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Hillcrest Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Hillcrest Country Club in Bartlesville, OK! There are 7 concrete courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, food, water, and lights.

name: Sooner Park
description: Sooner Park is a place to play pickleball in Bartlesville, OK. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: The Richard Kane YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at The Richard Kane YMCA in Bartlesville, OK! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water.
fees: Members only — Daily Fee Pass for $10
